notes.no_phase_clock: Spot joystick has the gait-phase code COMMENTED OUT (lines 172-182, 349-351) — unlike G1's phase_cos_sin(4). No external gait clock needed.
notes.no_linear_velocity: Policy state has NO local_linvel (privileged_state adds it for the critic only). Differs from go1/g1.
notes.qpos_error_history: Rolling buffer, history_len=3 -> 3*12=36. Each step prepends (noisy_joint_angles - motor_targets). STATEFUL: web obs builder must track motor_targets + joint history across steps.
notes.feet_pos: get_feet_pos(data) -> 4 feet site_xpos raveled (4*3=12). Frame TBD (resolve against bundled scene during web parity). FEET_SITES from spot_constants.
notes.motor_targets: default_pose + action*action_scale, clipped to [lowers, uppers]. action_scale=0.3.
notes.default_pose: keyframe('home').qpos[7:] (12-d) — exact values to be baked by the rollout script from the bundled scene (g1 pattern).

parity_risk: HARDER than go1/g1. Two new web-obs components not present in any current gallery policy: (1) stateful qpos_error_history (needs motor_target tracking), (2) kinematic feet_pos (needs foot-site FK + frame). The web obs builder (main.js) must gain both before byte-parity 0.0 is achievable.
